category_sources: source_facts.description says presenter console with multi-monitor support for PDF files; official site describes pdfpc as a GTK-based presentation viewer for PDF presentations.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is pdfpc; official site and GitHub repository use pdfpc.
docs_sources: Official project site provides overview, features, and getting-started links; official GitHub README includes installation, usage, FAQ link, and source compilation instructions.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already provides https://github.com/pdfpc/pdfpc; per instruction repo is returned as null and not re-evaluated.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official homepage identify a PDF presenter console with multi-monitor support; official GitHub README describes GTK-based presentation behavior and installation.
